Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents, To Compel Further Answers To Interrogatories And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-25-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ROLANDO PASQUALI, ESQ., Tel No. 650-579-0100 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. THOMAS J. FEENEY, ESQ. of the Law Offices of Carbone, Smoke, Smith, Bent & Leonard, Tel No. 510-267-7273 appearing for Defendants Gao Rong Chen and Jian Rong Chow.

RULING - Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court modified its tentative ruling, and ordered as follows: PLAINTIFF PAUL MAYCHROWITZ'S Motion To Compel Production Of Documents, To Compel Further Answers To Interrogatories And For Sanctions is granted. Prevailing party to prepare and e-mail a proposed order to the pro tem judge. Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz, Clerk: Sean Kane, Reporter: Tamara Willat, CSR# 4609, Tel No. 415-272-1753. (302/JPT)
